patterns.message: SECURITY (P2-001): lib/engine/ contains proprietary algorithm logic and MUST NOT be imported in client-side code. Use API routes (/api/opportunities, /api/prices) or the WebSocket feed. See SECURITY_AUDIT_ENGINE.md.
SECURITY (P2-001): server/engine/ and server/engines/ are CORE IP and MUST NOT be imported in app/ or components/. Move logic to an API route and call via fetch().
SECURITY (P2-001): server/services/ (paper-trader, trading-intelligence) is Node.js only. MUST NOT be imported in app/ or components/.
SECURITY (P2-001): server/registry/ contains fee tables that MUST NEVER be exposed in the browser bundle. Use /api routes for derived fee data only.
